intro: AI Lead Extractor is a ready-to-run Apify actor from FlowExtract API for lead generation & business. 1. Basic Contact Extraction (No Configuration Needed) This page explains what it does, who it's for, and how to get the most out of it — then includes the full technical documentation below.

faq.q: How do I run AI Lead Extractor?
faq.a: Open AI Lead Extractor on the Apify Store, provide your input (URLs or search parameters), and click Start. Results are available as JSON, CSV, or Excel, and via the Apify API.
AI Lead Extractor runs on Apify's pay-as-you-go platform; you only pay for the compute/usage a run consumes. Check the actor page for current pricing and any free tier.
